arabic: أُفَضِّلُ اسْتِخْدَامَ الْمِتْرُو لِلتَّنَقُّلِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ. التَّذَاكِرُ رَخِيصَةٌ وَالْمِتْرُو يَصِلُ دَائِمًا فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ. أَحْيَانًا أَرْكَبُ الْحَافِلَةَ لِأَرَى الشَّوَارِعَ وَالْمَبَانِيَ. يَجِبُ عَلَيْكَ شِرَاءُ بِطَاقَةِ النَّقْلِ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوبِ. هَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةُ تَمْنَعُ الضَّيَاعَ فِي الزِّحَامِ.
translation: Više volim koristiti metro za kretanje po gradu. Karte su jeftine i metro uvijek stiže na vrijeme. Ponekad idem autobusom da vidim ulice i zgrade. Morate kupiti kartu za prevoz prije vožnje. Ovaj način sprečava gubljenje u gužvi.
translationEn: I prefer using the metro to move around the city. Tickets are cheap and the metro always arrives on time. Sometimes I take the bus to see the streets and buildings. You must buy a transport card before riding. This method prevents getting lost in the traffic.
